name: ws2-mcp-oauth-spike
description: Throwaway WS2 spike — minimal MCP server + mock OAuth AS + self-verifying reference client. NOT production. Do not merge to main.

scripts.verify: node -e "console.error('WARNING: standalone verify runs the client against a SEPARATE-process server, so SCEN-A4 aud/exp degrade to signature-only checks. The authoritative Phase A gate is: npm run verify:all')" && tsx src/reference-client.ts
